weapons: Martial weapons with the Light property
tools: One type of artisan's tools or one musical instrument

features.name: Martial Arts
features.description: While unarmed or wielding monk weapons and not wearing armor or a shield: use Dexterity for attack and damage, roll a Martial Arts die (1d6) for unarmed-strike damage, and make one unarmed strike as a bonus action after attacking.

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.description: While wearing no armor and no shield, your AC = 10 + Dexterity modifier + Wisdom modifier.

features.name: Open Hand Technique
features.description: When you hit with a Flurry of Blows attack, you can impose one effect on the target: knock it prone, push it 15 feet, or deny it reactions until your next turn.
